notes: Tested the reporter's repro pattern with SkiaSharp 3.116.0 in a fresh net10.0 console app on host macOS arm64 and did not observe blank SVG <text> output after 100 rounds of parallel generation. This issue is reported as Windows-specific and could not be validated directly because no Windows host is available in this environment. Cross-platform Linux verification was attempted but blocked because the local Docker daemon is not running.

versionResults.notes: No blank <text> elements after 100 rounds x 5 parallel tasks x 100 draws.
Cross-platform check blocked: Docker daemon unavailable.
Phase 3B skipped because reporter version did not reproduce on tested host platform.
Phase 3C not required because Phase 3B was not triggered.

reproductionSteps.description: Create a fresh console project and add the reporter's SkiaSharp package version.
reproductionSteps.command: mkdir -p /tmp/repro-3437-host && cd /tmp/repro-3437-host && dotnet new console -n Repro --framework net10.0 && cd Repro && dotnet add package SkiaSharp --version 3.116.0
